headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -39.6)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 254% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 110 quotes and 72 at strong intensity, driving the highest score despite dropping from yesterday's peak.
• Fear activity remains notably quiet at -5.0, well below its historical range which has seen spikes up to 66.9.
• Optimism improved from yesterday's low but stays deeply negative with 35 strong-intensity quotes still reflecting widespread pessimism.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
